---
name: Proposal (new feature, framework refinement)
about: Propose a substantive change to the framework
labels: proposal
---

## What you're proposing

(One paragraph.)

## Why it matters

What problem does this solve? Which thesis does it sharpen? Which Skill Pack does it touch?

## Alternative approaches considered

What other ways could this be solved? Why is your proposal better?

## Klarna Test relevance

Does this proposal:
- [ ] Affect how the framework treats AI-replaces-human decisions? (If so, the proposal itself should pass a meta-Klarna-Test.)
- [ ] Change the Klarna Test threshold or rubric? (Foundational change; requires founder + counsel sign-off.)
- [ ] Neither.

## Has this been discussed?

- [ ] In Friday BR (link to Brain page).
- [ ] In a quarterly check-in.
- [ ] Direct conversation with Tali.
- [ ] First raise.
